# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for Cloud Storage bucket that stores application backups. Use default settings without versioning or lifecycle management to keep configuration simple. This is for our backup storage that we'll enhance later based on retention requirements.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: bucket-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: bucket
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: bucket
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: storage-bucket
        image: gcr.io/google-samples/cloud-storage-resource-container
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        volumeMounts:
        - name: backup-bucket-vol
          mountPath: /backup-bucket
      volumes:
      - name: backup-bucket-vol
        googleCloudStorage:
          bucketName: my-application-backups
